title: How to Start a Business Using AI: From Idea to Launch in One Day
summary: A YouTube video demonstrating Rocket 1.0, an AI workflow platform designed to solve context loss between tools by unifying research, notes, code, and tracking in a single interface. The video tests Rocket's ability to streamline startup ideation and MVP building alongside Claude and Cursor.
writeup: AI Master reviews Rocket 1.0, a platform built to solve context loss between AI tools during workflow integration. The video walks through building a startup idea end-to-end using Rocket's modules for research, tracking, and MVP creation, then weighs the result against Claude Code and manual integration. The framing centers on context compounding, where information carried across steps reduces the rework that fragmented tooling tends to cause. Concepts covered include enterprise AI, collaborative handoff, and low-code development.
